case_title: DELL'ACQUA, STUART vs. LEUNG, DANSON et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-23-1996, OSC CONTINUED FOR DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

(OSC CONT'D BECAUSE OF MR LEFF'S ILLNESS AS PER PLAINTIFF'S OFFICE CALL TO COURT). HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-24-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE 2ND OSC: $50.00 SANCTIONS IMPOSED BUT STAYED UPON PLTF. COMPLYING WITH ALL TRIAL DELAY RULES. PLTF. TO SERVE DEFT. OR FOR SHOWING CAUSE AS TO WHY CASE WAS NOT TRANSFERRED OR THE FEES PAID. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT(S) OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELL'ACQUA, STUART AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, DANSON DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-07-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-18-1995
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
